title: Fovl
description: Fovl is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly modpack focused on performance, visual polish, and subtle quality-of-life upgrades.
body:
### **Fovl is a lightweight, vanilla-style modpack focused on refining Minecraft**
A Modpack with a carefully chosen mix of performance optimizations, quality-of-life improvements, and subtle visual/resourcepack enhancements.   

### **For a preview of the Modpack go to the gallery**

(Optional)**There are a lot of other resourcepacks and mods that aren't everyone's cup of tea so I dedcided to add them here so if you like you can remove them.**

### **Shaderpacks:**

**[Complementary Shaders-Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)**
### **Resourcepacks:**

**[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#KVPxh2)**(Recommended)

**[Drodi's Illagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/drodis-illagers-fresh-animation)**

**[AL's Enderman Revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/als-enderman-revamped-x-fresh-animations)**

**[AL's Piglin Revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/als-piglins-revamped-x-fresh-animations)**

**[AL's Dungeon Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/als-dungeons-boss-bars)**

### **Mods:**

**[Auto Clicker](https://modrinth.com/mod/auto-clicker)**

**[Trade Cycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling)**

**[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)** (This is here bc of people who don't have friends)

**[World Edit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit)** (If you don't want or don't know how to use axiom)

**[Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)** (Alternative to both e4mc I added that instead of this for the cracked players)

**[Visible Traders](https://modrinth.com/mod/visible-traders)**

**[Rightclickharvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest)**
